name: @ingenium/extension
description: OpenCode client-side package — MCP server, observer plugin, skill-sync plugin. Everything needed to connect OpenCode to an Ingenium API. Install with: npx -y @ingenium/extension

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=ingenium-server && rm -rf dist && tsc && cp -r ../../services/ingenium-server/dist/config dist/config && cp -r ../../services/ingenium-server/dist/lib dist/lib && cp -r ../../services/ingenium-server/dist/scripts dist/scripts && test -f dist/config/index.js
